Launched 'Avvatar Protein Cold Coffee', entering India's fast-growing ready-to-drink protein beverage segment. New-age business segment including Avvatar recorded 91% YoY growth in FY26.

Consolidated PAT rose 27.5% YoY to ₹335.25 crore in Q4FY26; total income increased 6.1% YoY. Shares jumped 9.21%. Also announced a dividend of ₹4 per share. ICICI Securities retained 'Add' with target ₹550. Equirus Securities retained 'Long' with target ₹577. Analysts see recovery-led gains in FY27.
